'''Pillik''' was a young [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Omwati/Legends|Omwati]] who was taken by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Empire]] to be trained (along with several other young Omwati children, including [[Qwi Xux]]) to build [[Superweapon/Legends|superweapons]] for the Empire. During a test, he had a seizure and was removed by [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtroopers]], screaming that he wanted to finish the test. Due to his failure, his home city was destroyed by the Empire and he was executed.

==Appearances==
*''[[Jedi Search]]'' {{1st}} {{Flash}}
